scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:render: node scripts/apply-render-patches.cjs && node scripts/verify-render-build.cjs && node scripts/verify-route-input-hardening-v1.cjs && pnpm --filter @workspace/liquidity-heatmap build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server build && RENDER_VERIFY_PHASE=post node scripts/verify-render-build.cjs && node scripts/verify-route-input-hardening-v1.cjs
